expectations.text: Uses force create element_like spring_damper (not single_component_force or bushing)

expectations.evidence: Used 'free_length = 250.0' instead of 'length = 250.0'. The correct Adams CMD parameter name is 'length', not 'free_length'.

expectations.text: Explains that spring_damper is for 1-DOF along a line of action
expectations.evidence: Response explains: 'It acts along the line connecting an I marker (on one part) and a J marker (on another part), applying equal and opposite forces based on relative displacement and velocity'
